title: Session Day Drill-Down: Página de Stats Detalhada por Sessão
plan: Enhance prepare_session_day() in data.py to include extended stats (12+ stats), bb/100, win rate $/hr, total duration, all-in count, global average comparisons, top 5 notable hands with card details, and session-vs-session comparison data
Expand session_day.html summary cards section with bb/100, $/hr, duration, all-in count, biggest pot details
Create extended stats table with all 12+ stats, health badges, and comparison-vs-global indicators (arrows/colors)
Add positional breakdown section per session (mini table: position × VPIP/PFR/3Bet/bb100 with deviation highlighting)
Upgrade profit chart to larger interactive version with EV overlay, hover tooltips showing hand details, and all-in markers
Expand notable hands section to top 5 wins and top 5 losses with hero/villain cards, board, position, pot size, and expandable action sequence
Build session-vs-session comparison section for multi-session days with side-by-side stats table
Add CSS styles for new components: extended stat cards, comparison columns, positional table, larger chart, card display with suit symbols, comparison layout
Add JavaScript interactivity: chart hover tooltips, expandable hand details, responsive table handling
Mirror all template changes to tournament/session_day.html
Run quality gates: typecheck, lint, tests, build verification
